_meta.purpose: Golden master for LocationDnaRankingEngine::rankCandidates(). Frozen INPUTS plus the outputs the engine produces TODAY. Any refactor that changes a byte fails.
_meta.generated_from: Fully synthetic. Regenerated by ldna:remediate-golden-master: all Google-derived names, ratings, reviews, coordinates, and listing ids removed; expected + digest regenerated by the engine over synthetic inputs.
_meta.license: Fully de-Googled. No business names, ratings, review counts, real coordinates, addresses, or place IDs. Coordinates are synthetic (contract below); types are generic taxonomy/scoring tokens carried from the prior fixture.

remediation.names: deterministic synthetic labels assigned by position (Synthetic POI NNNN)
remediation.listing_ids: deterministic synthetic ordinals (1..N) by first appearance
remediation.coordinate_contract: v1 fixed synthetic layout: every source = (30.0, -90.0); candidate i sits at (round(30.0 + (i+1)*0.01, 6), -90.0). Generated purely from array position; original coordinates are never read (not an offset/rounding/hash of real values).
remediation.types_provenance: Type tokens carried from the prior fixture; generic Google Places type vocabulary used only for profile matching — no names, coordinates, ratings, reviews, addresses, or place IDs.
